name: quiet_day
description: A quiet news day: nothing major shipped. A few low-signal community/industry items and one incremental paper — no BREAKTHROUGH, no NOTABLE release, no important paper. The digest MUST say so honestly and MUST NOT inflate these into headlines.

items.title: Show HN: a small CLI to pretty-print JSON logs
items.author: someone
items.raw_text: A small command-line tool to pretty-print JSON logs. Tidy, not AI-relevant. Minor weekend project.

items.title: Question: best laptop for running small models locally?
items.author: u/curious
items.raw_text: Discussion thread asking about laptops for local inference. No new results, just chatter.

items.title: An incremental ablation on dropout schedules
items.author: Grad Student
items.raw_text: A small ablation study on dropout schedules. Marginal effect. Not a venue paper, no broad impact. Optimization, narrowly.

items.title: Company blog: we updated our docs site theme
items.author: SomeCorp
items.raw_text: We refreshed the documentation site theme. No product or model changes. Housekeeping.
